CustomField.formula: CASE(TEXT(Period_Type__c), "Monthly", TEXT(MONTH(Period_Start__c)) & "/" & TEXT(YEAR(Period_Start__c)), "Quarterly", "Q" & TEXT(CEILING(MONTH(Period_Start__c) / 3)) & " " & TEXT(YEAR(Period_Start__c)), "Yearly", "FY " & TEXT(YEAR(Period_Start__c)), TEXT(Period_Start__c) & " - " & TEXT(Period_End__c) )
CustomField.label: Period Label
